title: cylindrolobus korinchensis
intro: Cylindrolobus korinchensis, also known as the Korinch tree, is a plant species native to the Western Ghats region of India. It is a tree-like plant that belongs to the family Loganiaceae and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Cylindrolobus korinchensis is often used in herbal preparations, including decoctions and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
